_meta.purpose: Schools Pilot — Kids edition (WPK) behaviour library. Read by api/migrate/import_school_behaviours.php.
_meta.structure: 72 PERMA-H behaviours (12 per scope/direction set × 6 sets) + 25 generic UP + 25 generic DOWN
_meta.voice: School-age appropriate. Spin Up: observable positive behaviours worth recognising. Spin Down: observable behaviours worth pausing on (factual, not judgmental). Refine titles to match local school vocabulary if needed.
_meta.drafted_by: Claude — 2026-06-26 Phase B draft for Marty review
_meta.rerun_safety: Importer skips activities already present via (consumer, sub, scope, direction, dimension, title) dedupe. Re-running after a library edit only inserts new/changed-title rows; existing rows keep their qr_token.

behaviours.title: Notice and name something you feel grateful for today
Pause to enjoy a small win
Get lost in something you love doing
Use a strength to solve a tricky problem
Say something kind to yourself
Forgive yourself for a mistake
Do something that matters to you, even if no one sees
Set a tiny goal that makes a big difference
Finish a task you have been putting off
Try something new even though it is hard
Drink water and stretch between lessons
Sleep on time tonight
Spoke harshly to yourself when something went wrong
Stewed on a bad mood without naming what was going on
Distracted yourself from every task before starting
Skipped a practice you said you would do today
Told yourself you don't matter
Hid a mistake instead of owning it
Quit something that mattered because it got hard
Pretended you didn't care when you did
Left a job half-finished and moved on
Talked yourself out of trying
Skipped meals or rushed through them all day
Stayed up late on a screen when you needed sleep
Share what made you smile today with your class
Lift the mood when a classmate is having a hard time
Help a classmate who's stuck
Bring an idea to a group project that lifts it
Include someone who's been left out
Say sorry first when there's a misunderstanding
Stand up for what's fair, even when it's awkward
Make a quiet contribution that helps the whole class
Celebrate a classmate's success out loud
Push through a group challenge together
Invite a classmate to move with you at break
Look after a classmate who isn't feeling well
Brought a sour mood into the room and let it spread
Mocked a classmate's enthusiasm
Disrupted the lesson repeatedly
Refused to take part in a group activity
Talked behind a classmate's back
Excluded someone on purpose
Spread a rumour that hurt someone
Stayed a bystander when something unfair was happening
Sabotaged a classmate's work
Took credit for someone else's effort
Pressured a classmate to skip the rules around food or rest
Teased a classmate about how they look or move
Bring positive energy to a whole-school event
Welcome a new student to the school
Volunteer for a school-wide project or initiative
Bring an idea to improve the whole school
Build a bridge between two year levels
Show younger students how things work
Represent the school well off-site or at events
Speak up for something the whole school values
Help with a school project that lasts beyond your year
Run an initiative that lifts the whole school
Take care of the school grounds during break
Keep shared spaces clean and welcoming
Brought the whole-school mood down with a sour attitude
Mocked a school-wide tradition
Opted out of a whole-school event when everyone else was in
Disrupted an assembly or shared moment
Bullied across year levels
Disrespected a staff member
Misrepresented the school while off-site
Trashed a school value publicly
Damaged school equipment or shared resources
Sabotaged a school-wide initiative
Littered or vandalised school grounds
Created unsafe conditions for younger students
Arrived on time and ready
Completed homework on time
Showed kindness to a peer
Helped a teacher without being asked
Brought all the materials needed for class
Asked a thoughtful question
Tried again after getting it wrong
Listened carefully when someone else was speaking
Followed a school rule that was easy to break
Tidied up a shared space
Walked quietly in the corridors
Held the door open for someone
Returned something that didn't belong to you
Said please and thank you without being prompted
Joined an activity outside your usual group
Stayed focused for the full lesson
Gave honest feedback on someone's work
Asked for help when you needed it
Looked out for a younger student
Offered to help carry something heavy
Tried a new food or activity at lunchtime
Reported something unsafe to a staff member
Said hello to someone new
Picked up litter that wasn't yours
Wrote a note to thank someone
Disrupted the lesson repeatedly
Late to class without notice
Did not complete homework without a good reason
Spoke over a teacher or classmate
Left a mess in a shared space
Used unkind language toward a peer
Refused to follow a reasonable instruction
Damaged school property carelessly
Lied about a small thing
Took something that wasn't yours
Excluded someone on purpose
Pushed or shoved in the corridor
Threw food or rubbish
Used a phone during a no-phone moment
Mocked a younger student
Was rude to a staff member
Refused to apologise after a clear mistake
Spread a rumour
Cheated on a piece of work
Pressured a peer into something they didn't want to do
Wandered off during a group activity
